key_decisions: Current evidence is not_ready for automatic include_l0.
Future behavior-changing work requires a separate plan and stronger evidence.
next_actions: Decide whether to expand the deterministic evidence corpus toward the threshold gates.
open_questions: Should the next governed slice expand corpus diversity or pause GAP-0001 work?
risks: Thresholds may be mistaken for automatic inclusion approval unless the not_ready decision is kept explicit.
summary_text: PLAN-20260707-0003 completed the L0 discovery advisor acceptance-threshold review. The generated thresholds artifact records eight gates and marks the current corpus not_ready for automatic include_l0. Automatic inclusion remains unapproved and GAP-0001 remains open.
